notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the kernel SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 9.4. It addresses 5 CVEs: CVE-2025-39864, CVE-2025-39955, CVE-2025-39841, CVE-2023-52451, CVE-2025-40186.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document
